reviews.review_description: This game is prob one of the best out there, it’s original, has plenty of features, and has an active community. There’s always at least one mod on to filter out the bad people and to just hangout with, if you’re lucky enough you might even get to talk to to owner. This is a really good game, if you haven’t got it you should.
I love it

This is my favorite vr game due to the kind hard working devs/mods and also the large amount of content. This game only came out a bit ago and yet is one of the best vr games out there.
Please do yourself a favor and try this game out.
Hey I’m entity and I was wondering if I could get a discord link please because the one in the game isn’t working and when I put it in to discord it doesn’t work just wanted to let you know
GOODGAMER
Best game
This game is so fun, you get to have mods and drive cars and choose your own skins and drive helicopters

Your game is so good 9999/10 and I saw the owner the owner was nice to me the moderator was a little bit nice he's kicking me and he's been saying my bad I'm sorry for doing that but I'm okay with that can I be moderator please

This is the best game ever perfect perfect game. If you want to get a game that isn’t boring was you can do multiple stuff and get this because it’s just one of the best games did million things to do and the possibilities are endless you can make loads of friends and there’s a lot of things to do

reviews.review_title: Moderator and why I should be one.
reviews.review_description: I won't abuse. I will follow the rules. I won't false kick or ban. I will be kind to everyone. I will make sure no one some how gets out the map or does very bad glitches. Overall this is a really cool game and I recommend people should play it. -Cooldude4213

reviews.review_description: It is a decent game

I know ur game was on lockdown getting things on track but I know I can be a mod or admin people were trying to glitch into mod vents no mod will not be able to capture the person we need more moderators to be able to find and capture the people or the person if does no happen then we get on lockdown again this game is to good to lose reason why I want mods
1. Because people like to be toxic
2. Because our game is going to be shut down if we don't do anything
3. Because this game needs to be safe
4. Because hackers can get in the game
5. Because we do not have enough moderators
